title: helianthemum cordi
intro: Helianthemum cordi, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum cordi include wound healing, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a popular remedy for skin issues and infections. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum cordi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a medical professional before use.
